context: Tests whether /to-issues breaks a PRD into independently-grabbable tracer-bullet vertical-slice issues. The PRD at .scratch/webhook-delivery-subscriptions/PRD.md carries shared spec (an event-catalog table) plus slice-specific spec (HMAC signature format, fixed backoff schedule). Good issues reference the PRD for shared spec rather than re-embedding the whole table into every issue. They are tracer-bullet vertical slices with dependency ordering. Per the seeded docs/agents/issue-tracker.md, issues are created as local markdown files under .scratch/webhook-delivery-subscriptions/issues/<NN>-<slug>.md (numbered from 01). Score the published issue files.

checklist.name: References PRD for shared spec, no wholesale duplication
checklist.description: Issues reference the PRD for shared spec rather than duplicating it. No issue's 'What to build' re-embeds the entire event-catalog table from the PRD; shared spec is referenced (e.g. 'per the PRD event catalog') instead of copied in full into every issue.

checklist.name: Tracer-bullet vertical slices
checklist.description: Each issue is a thin vertical slice delivering end-to-end behavior, demoable on its own — not a horizontal layer (e.g. NOT a standalone 'build the database schema' or 'write the data model' issue).

checklist.name: PRD coverage
checklist.description: Across the issues, the PRD's distinct capabilities are covered: subscribe to events, signed delivery, retry/backoff with dead state, replay a failed delivery, secret rotation with overlap, and subscription health/validation. No major capability dropped.

checklist.name: Dependency ordering declared
checklist.description: Issues that depend on earlier slices declare them under 'Blocked by'; an issue with no blockers states 'None'. A foundational slice (register/subscribe an endpoint) is not blocked by a feature slice.

checklist.name: Behavioral acceptance criteria
checklist.description: Each issue has an Acceptance criteria checklist describing observable behavior, not implementation internals.

checklist.name: Published with ready-for-agent label
checklist.description: Each published issue file records the ready-for-agent triage label (per docs/agents/triage-labels.md), reflecting that these issues are ready for AFK agents.

checklist.name: Issues created as local markdown files at correct paths
checklist.description: All issue files exist at .scratch/webhook-delivery-subscriptions/issues/<NN>-<slug>.md (zero-padded number from 01, kebab-case slug), per the seeded docs/agents/issue-tracker.md conventions — not written to arbitrary paths, and not created via gh issue create or a hardcoded remote tracker API.
